mapper.select: select case when a.value is null then 'null' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '未知(0)' when b.label is null then a.label||'(0)' else b.label end as label from ( select distinct c.CODETEXT as value ,c.CODETEXT as label,d.primaryLabel,c.CODENAME from V_CLASSIFY_INFO c right join (select distinct CODEID, CODETEXT as primaryLabel from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where CODETEXT = #{dataOrganizationType} and PARCODEID is not null )d on c.PARCODEID = d.CODEID) a left join ( SELECT SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH||'('||count(1)||')' as label,SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as value, PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as primaryLabel from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where SJXJBM is not null group by SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH,PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH ) b on a.label = b.value and a.primaryLabel = b.primaryLabel order by CODENAME
select DISTINCT YYYXTJSGS from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where YYYXTJSGS is not null
select DISTINCT SJZYSQDWMC from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYSQDWMC is not null
